title: FAQ
subtitle: Things I get asked a lot

questions.label: Tell me about your background.
questions.content: 10+ years building systems in AI, backend, and hardware — in both enterprise and experimental environments. I combine research thinking with practical delivery. Worked across the US and Japan, led teams of 5–15 engineers, founded an R&D AI company, and exited with profit.

questions.label: What kind of teams have you led?
questions.content: Teams of 5–15 engineers across AI, backend, and embedded systems. Focus on architecture, system design, and aligning execution with real-world constraints.

questions.label: What happened with your company?
questions.content: Built an R&D-driven engineering company, delivered real products, and exited by selling its intellectual property at a profit.

questions.label: What do you actually work with?
questions.content: Backend systems, AI integration, and automation — primarily TypeScript, Python, and cloud infrastructure. Deep experience in embedded systems and computer vision when needed.

questions.label: What domains have you shipped in?
questions.content: Automation pipelines, AI classification and decision support, computer vision, real-time streaming, embedded systems (Arduino, Raspberry Pi, Jetson), and full-stack platforms.

questions.label: What work are you open to?
questions.content: System diagnosis and architecture design, AI and automation strategy, high-impact consulting — short-term or recurring. Also open to contract and selective full-time roles.

questions.label: What languages do you speak?
questions.content: Portuguese (native), English (fluent), Japanese (business, JLPT N2), Spanish (conversational).
